=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Both fixes applied. Re-running Gate 3a.
[tool: Agent(Tester rework: col-030 graph_suppression test plan) → Both fixes are correctly applied. Let me do a final self-check against the requirements:

**FIX 1 verification:**
- Line 6: `-> (Vec<bool>, Vec<Option<u64>>)` — DONE
- All 8 Act lines: `let (mask, cids) = suppress_contradicts(...)` — DONE (confirmed via replace_all)
- `cids` assertions on T-GS-0]
[Assistant] REWORKABLE FAIL on two issues in `test-plan/graph_suppression.md`. Sending the tester back for rework (iteration 1/2).
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Gate 3b: implementation wave delivers production code but zero mandatory tests — entire test modules absent
SM must commit all in-flight working tree diffs before invoking gate validators
Gate 3b: handler integration tests absent when implementation agent treats existing smoke tests as sufficient coverage
Parallel pseudocode + test-plan spawn creates interface divergence when pseudocode changes a function signature
Gate 3c: always verify committed code, not working tree state
